infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AccessibleNav uses the camera to detect hazards in your path and display augmented reality navigation overlays.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AccessibleNav uses your location to provide turn-by-turn walking directions to your destination.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AccessibleNav may use the microphone in conjunction with camera features.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AccessibleNav uses your location to calculate and update walking routes in real time.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: AccessibleNav needs camera access for hazard detection and AR overlays.
